text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm accompanying Symboli Rudolf to the
Fleetfoot Festival, a celebration for Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I gave the course a test run. The positioning of
the targets and the condition of the equipment
all seems to be in order. The archery planning
committee has done an excellent job.

text_block_list.name: Tracen Student A
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you very much, President! We're so
lucky to have you performing the inspection
personally!

text_block_list.name: Tracen Student B
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, President. Could we trouble you for
some guidance for this year's archers?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It would be my pleasure. To call it noblesse oblige
may be a bit much, but it is undeniably my duty
to bestow my knowledge upon them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Symboli Rudolf spends the day making
sure the Fleetfoot Festival goes smoothly.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your words at the closing ceremony were
wonderful, President.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Air Groove. Now, if you'll excuse me...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Of course. Well, the festivities have come to a
close. All that's left now is to enjoy the rest of the
day. After all, everybody needs a breather every
once in a while, including you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...? And what do we have here?

text_block_list.name: Food Stall Lady
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for all your hard work, President! We've
extended our opening hours for the day!
choice_data_list:
Come to think of it, we didn't check out the
stalls.

Come to think of it, we didn't check out the
stalls.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You arranged all this for me? You really shouldn't
have...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I would have to be the most heartless of tyrants
to disregard such a courteous act. I shall be sure
to savor this opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Farewell!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Shooting Gallery Staff
text_block_list.text: Wow! You're a great shot, President.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Aha, thank you. I do have some shooting range
experience.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes. My grandfather took me on a few trips to
America, where I had the opportunity to try my
hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Symboli Rudolf has an explanation for her
shooting skills, her talents don't end there.

text_block_list.name: Cookie Cutting Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
H-heavens! I've never seen anyone cut a cookie
that intricate with such precision! You're
unbelievably dexterous!

text_block_list.name: Cotton Candy Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
Cotton candy! Make your own cotton candy for
only a hundred yen! Whoa, President, you're
really good at this!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, thank you very much. It appears I still have
the muscle memory from when I used to enjoy
handicraft. I suppose it is like riding a bike.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I would hardly say everything...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But, come to think of it, passing on knowledge
and experience is a thing of great importance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So, Trainer. I am generally the one who comes to
you seeking advice... but just for tonight, what if I
were to impart my wisdom unto you?
choice_data_list: What happened to taking a breather?
What happened to taking a breather?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But it is. My proposition is a breath of fresh air for
the both of us. Why don't we take advantage of
this opportunity to both experience a fresh
perspective?
choice_data_list: Okay, then. How about some shooting tips?

I want to know how to make picturesque cotton
candy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Heh. Shall we head back to the stall, then?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So, Trainer... Which prize takes your fancy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Urged to choose by Symboli Rudolf, I point at the
prize that's caught my eye—the one on the
highest shelf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
An excellent choice... Well then, allow me to
assess your skills. Now, look down the sight...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Shooting Gallery Staff
text_block_list.text: Ah, not quite! But nice try!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, you still have plenty more shots. Try
to visualize the trajectory and adjust your aim
after any misses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking Symboli Rudolf's words to heart, I assume
a more comfortable position by resting my elbow
on the counter. As I'm adjusting my aim...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Something lightly brushes my shoulder.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...My apologies. I was too close.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I hope you will forgive me. I felt that I had to
share your point of view in order to offer
satisfactory advice.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Not bad. Your aim is nearly on target. Try
aiming a bit farther to the bottom-right—yes, like
that. Go ahead and give it another try.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf whispers words of encouragement
in my ear, and I adjust the muzzle according to
her advice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Trainer! The prize is yours!
choice_data_list: It's all thanks to your instruction!
It's all thanks to your instruction!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, well, that is quite some praise! I've only
been your instructor for a single evening, but
what a rewarding one it has been.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling that Symboli Rudolf's expression
seems warmer than usual.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
"Picturesque," you say. Heh. Well, if I am to meet
your expectations, I will need to muster all of my
skill.

text_block_list.name: Cotton Candy Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
Oh, President! Nice to see you again! Would you
like another go at the cotton candy machine?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid not, but my trainer would.
Right, now hold out the chopstick...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... You should hold it up a little higher.
Gather the sugar by twirling the stick around...
Good, now move it toward the bottom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try using the chopstick to fashion the cotton
candy into the same shape as Symboli Rudolf's
earlier effort, but to no avail.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Hmmm.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Pardon me. Let me give you a demonstration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Symboli Rudolf places her hands on mine.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, this angle should work. Exactly. Now spin it
like so.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Next, tilt the chopstick upwards... Very good.
That should do nicely.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...And voila!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Retracting the chopstick from the cotton candy
machine, I can hardly believe that the
picture-perfect cotton candy before me is my own
doing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Give it another try while the feeling is still fresh.
Perhaps you could make one for me this time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I do my very best to make a nice, big ball
of cotton candy just for Symboli Rudolf.
